A perfectly still mountain lake at first light — the water surface so glass-smooth that distant snow-capped peaks and the pale pink dawn sky reflect with impossible clarity. A thin layer of mist drifts just above the water. A single weathered wooden rowboat floats motionless near the center
splitting the symmetry. The slender condensed title "REFLECT" runs horizontally exactly along the waterline at the frame's middle
the upper half of the letters mirroring as a perfect reflection beneath the line — the title is itself its own reflection. A girl with white hair pulled into hair intakes
single side bun in an updo
bags under her purple eyes with white pupils
a black hair ribbon at her bun
medium breasts under a soft cloud-grey kimono-inspired robe
stands in the rowboat with her hand trailing in the water
watching her reflection break into ripples. A petite girl with flat chest
yellow scrunchie pulling one side up (the yellow vivid against the dawn palette)
hair over one crimson red eye
sits opposite her in the rowboat in mirrored posture — but her reflection in the water shows the WHITE-haired girl instead of herself
their identities swapped only in the water. The title "REFLECT" passes IN FRONT of the mist but BEHIND the rowboat's silhouette.
